
Simulation Religion

As our technology approaches the capability to simulate the world including people. There would there be lots and lots of simulations. Meaning that looking at the probabilities we are most likely to be in a simulation.

It might make sense to run simulations on a person's DNA. You could run thousands of simulations putting that person in a variety of environments. You can look if overall the person is "good" or "bad". Maybe in some circumstances they do amazingly well. You can then decide that new babies will only have "good" DNA, or ensure specialists are brought up in the best environment for them.

This has many of the hallmarks of a religion. You decide what is "good" or "bad". If you are good you will be born and really live (go to heaven). The world will be so advanced that it will essentially be heaven.

Athiests will outnumber religious people by 2038. This give many of them a "religion" that is kind of science based. There is no need for magic or the supernatural. It can't easily be disproven.

It can give people a purpose and structure to their lives.

occam's razor and reality

If I managed to get into power I would troll everyone, it would be on pretty similar lines to what DJT does. But maybe not as overt.

Surely we live in some kind of simulation, people can't be that stupid to believe some of the stuff DJT says and elect him.

Maybe Brexit and Tumps election are signs that we really are in some kind of simulation. It's soo ridiculous that it can't be true.

Donald J. Trumpe@realDonaldTrump 15h 
VÉ need to be smart, vigilant and tough. We need the courts to give us back 
our rights. VÉ need the Travel San as an extra level ot safety'

### Situations

- The simulation may start partway through.
- So if you start with an immoral job surrounded by people who think what you do is fine, but it’s clear to everyone that it’s wrong, what do you do? Will you be weak and just carry on with all the income as the expense of others who will suffer or will you expose what is happening at great personal cost.?

Why is information based on the surface area rather than volume. That sounds like a simulation simplification. Black holes or holography.

The fact we can't see any other life the Fermi paradox, is just to simplify computations.

The lack of seeing particles from supersymetry and stuff. Removing particles to make simulations easier.

Pi is irrational since it's a rounding error in the computer, obviously pi should be rational.

Real world has super symmetry, we don't for computation reasons.

In physics when we do a simulation we often use probabilities and random numbers rather than simulating everything from the lowest levels. So if we were to make larger simulations you'd expect those realities to be probabilistic rather than deterministic like the real world is. 

Also in computer games you don't create everything in the game, you only create stuff the player can see. So there are two kinds of laws in games, so the rule change when you observe things. So that could be argued to be why QM has a completely different postulate around observation and wavefunction collapse.
